## checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (ruff, mypy, pytest)
- [ ] native parity tests pass, if a kernel was touched
- [ ] no test was weakened or skipped to go green
- [ ] measured and vendor reported numbers stay in separate tiers
- [ ] if a result does not favour the structured arm, it is reported, not buried
